channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish bags, 5th March
item.description:
Some one has dumped there house hold rubbish on pavement and foxes have rip bags open and now all the stuff in bags is all over the path wich people got to walk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Medway Road, Barnes Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Main Entrance Door Not Locking, 5th March
item.description:
The main entrance door is unlocked from past two weeks and it's locking system is not working. It need to be fixed as this area is affected by trespassers
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haymerle Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working for 3mths, 5th March
item.description:
This street lamp is not working again. It was repaired last year and required an on-site visit, so it does not appear to be something that can be fixed remotely. The lamp is located just before the flyover in an area where there have been numerous accidents, making this a serious safety concern. Vans are often parked directly underneath the light and, when it is not working, vehicles have previously collided with them due to poor visibility. Please ensure this issue is properly investigated and repaired on site. The report should not be marked as “fixed” until the light is actually functioning. Marking the issue as “fixed pending resolution” does not accurately reflect the situation.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 54, Arbuthnot Lane, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Asbestos on sidewalk, 5th March
item.description:
Asbestos roofing on footpath

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cranmer Road, Oval, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned chairs on green space, 4th March
item.description:
Abandoned chairs on green space
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ravensbourne Avenue, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandanned bicycle for many months., 4th March
item.description:
This bicycle has been locked here for MANY months now. Handle grips have been taken away. Location is in front of former WH Smith ( empty retail unit now), 9 Harben Parade NW3 5EP

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 6, Harben Parade, South Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole, 4th March
item.description:
Has been getting deeper over the past few weeks.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on pavement opposite Cleaver Square, 4th March
item.description:
This is the Southwark side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 124, Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green full of rubbish for months!!, 4th March
item.description:
What used to be a small green for children has now become a fly tipping favourite spot by some repugnant residents. All sorts of krap in and around the green.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Montcalm Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped bike, 4th March
item.description:
Bike not parked in bay

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldfield Grove, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lincoln Road EN1, 4th March
item.description:
Mattress flytipped on the pavement by Bush Hill Park Park opposite Harman Road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Harman Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Potholes, 4th March
item.description:
A series of two or three rapidly deteriorating potholes have opened up along cattlegate road just after the railway. These are getting bigger daily.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cattlegate Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Two potholes on Hurst Lane, 4th March
item.description:
These potholes have been here for several months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hurst Lane, West Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I reported this noisy manhole cover over four months ago and still nothing has been done. I will be contacting my local MP., 4th March
item.description:
Too noisy manhole covers opposite 376 Bromley Road been going on for at least five months now and still has not been repaired. This is beyond the joke and keeping me up all night.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Southend, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame dumped, 4th March
item.description:
Dumped outside back of Vestry Road / Nisa

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Vestry Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep potholes within school grounds, 4th March
item.description:
These two extremely deep and large potholes have been here since last year and still not been remedied. Potholes cannot be avoided when driving on the road therefore causing medical issues such as back pain and more.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Yarnton Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dorset Road Streetlight not working, 4th March
item.description:
Streetlight not working in front of 7 Dorset Road SW8 1EF It is the only streetlight on the pavement on that side of Dorset Road so it is now very dark at night there. It has stopped working for the last few days.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dorset Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outisde no. 21, 4th March
item.description:
The tree died several over a year ago and was cut down and now a large unsightly stump remains. It doesn't appear to be being replanted. Please can it be removed - if it was taken away we'd get at least 2 more parking spaces which we are in desperate need of in a very overcrowded street.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Spencer Rise, Dartmouth Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Ship compass play frame has metal post not fixed in place, 4th March
item.description:
One of the metal posts in the spinning ship compass play frame has come out of its fixed place and could cause injury.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Acacia Way, Blackfen, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street lamp not working, 4th March
item.description:
The street lamp half way up chartwell way se20 is not working. The lamp is out. It is very dark and unsafe to walk up the road in complete darkness
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Chartwell Way, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
